title: Order Management API — Batch Processing Mode (v2.1)
raw_text:
## Summary

Version 2.1 of the Order Management API introduces a batch processing mode for high-volume order submission workflows...

## What Changed

- Added POST /orders/batch endpoint accepting up to 500 orders per request.
- Response includes per-order status with error details for partial failures.
- Rate limit increased from 100 to 1000 requests/minute for batch endpoint.

## Rollout

GA release. Available immediately. No migration required for existing integrations.

rollout_hints.target_population: All API integrators using order submission endpoints
